Yesterday afternoon, I stopped by for coffee and a snack... Daniel, the guy who served me, was excellent 💪. He was really friendly, super attentive, and helpful to me and the other customers there. The coffee was fantastic 👌. He made it much better than "other well-known coffee shops"...

reviews.comment:
La experiencia es mala 😔la atención deja mucho que desear hay uno solo en la playa o veces nadie hay que esperar que se dignen en atender nos queda cerca la lentitud y mala atención nos hace ir a otros IPF . Falta que le deen clase de atención al cliente

(Translated by Google)
The experience was bad 😔 The service leaves much to be desired. There's only one person on the beach, or sometimes none at all, and you have to wait for them to deign to attend to you. It's close by, but the slow and poor service makes us go to other IPFs (Integrated Physical Therapy Centers). They really need a customer service course.

reviewReply.comment:
hola buenos días ! tomaremos en cuenta su reclamo sobre la atención . por otro lado sobre el personal siempre se mantuvo 1 solo playero por turno noche en la YPF .
